message:
refactor(abi): remove unnecessary pointer casts and use while-let loop

- Remove redundant *mut u32/*const u32 casts in getgroups/setgroups,
  getresuid/getresgid since libc types are already u32
- Convert loop-match-break pattern to while-let in netlink_dump

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
